Name: Harrow Hong Kong
Tagline: Harrow Hong Kong: A premier international school offering top-tier education for pupils aged 3 to 18
About: Harrow Hong Kong is renowned for its rigorous British curriculum, fostering academic excellence and holistic development. It stands out for its emphasis on leadership and character building, preparing students for global success.
Philosophy: Harrow Hong Kong's educational approach integrates traditional academic rigor with innovative teaching methods, nurturing critical thinking and creativity. The school emphasizes leadership skills, encouraging students to become responsible global citizens.
Outcomes: Harrow Hong Kong boasts impressive university placements, with graduates attending top institutions like Oxford, Cambridge, and Ivy League schools. Students consistently achieve high scores in IGCSE and A-Level examinations, reflecting the school's academic excellence.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply through the school's online portal, with applications typically opening a year in advance. The process includes an assessment and interview, ensuring a good fit with Harrow's academic and community values.
Quote: Empowering leaders with courage, compassion, and creativity to shape a better world for tomorrow.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Teachers at Harrow Hong Kong hold advanced degrees from prestigious institutions and possess international teaching certifications, ensuring a high standard of education. Many have extensive experience in British and international curricula, enhancing their pedagogical expertise.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Harrow Hong Kong prioritizes student wellbeing through comprehensive pastoral care and counseling services, fostering a supportive community. The school offers wellness programs and workshops, promoting mental health and resilience among students.
Performance.Academic Integration: Harrow Hong Kong delivers a robust curriculum featuring IGCSE and A-Level qualifications, emphasizing critical thinking and creativity. The school integrates innovative teaching methods and interdisciplinary projects, preparing students for diverse global challenges.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Harrow Hong Kong achieve outstanding results, with high acceptance rates to top universities worldwide, including Oxbridge and Ivy League schools. Students consistently excel in IGCSE and A-Level exams, reflecting academic excellence.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Harrow Hong Kong boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including science labs, art studios, and a performing arts center. The campus features extensive sports amenities, such as swimming pools, tennis courts, and a fitness center.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Harrow Hong Kong maintains high educational standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings, ensuring transparent communication. The school undergoes periodic reviews and holds prestigious international accreditations, affirming its commitment to excellence.

Name: Kellett School
Tagline: At Kellett School, the top British international school in Hong Kong, we cultivate a love of learning and confidence for life in all our students.
About: Kellett School is a prestigious British international school in Hong Kong, offering a rigorous curriculum that prepares students for IGCSE and A-levels. It is renowned for fostering a nurturing environment that encourages academic excellence and personal growth.
Philosophy: Kellett School embraces a student-centered approach, emphasizing individualized learning and holistic development. We integrate British educational standards with local cultural context, ensuring students are well-prepared for global challenges and opportunities.
Outcomes: Congratulations to our students on another fantastic set of A-level results! As grade boundaries this year were recalibrated, we are proud to say that 88% of our cohort got accepted into their first choice or insurance universities.
Admissions: Prospective families are encouraged to apply early for the 2026/27 academic year, as spaces are limited. The application process includes submission of academic records, an interview, and a campus tour to ensure the best fit for each student.
Quote: Our classes for the 2026/27 academic year are now full. Please contact admissions@kellettschool.com for further information.
AppDeadline: s, but you may wish to check with the Admissions Office if t

Performance.Student Wellbeing: ☀️💦 Our #KellettY11 students took to the Sky Pitch for a game of "wet" rounders today. Let’s just say some were more interested in the water than the wickets, but it was the perfect way to soak up the sun before embarking on their study leave.
Performance.Academic Integration: Physical Education and Sport are an integral part of student life at Kellett. Great importance is placed on the value of these areas as a core element of a balanced education, which is delivered through both the curriculum and extra curricular activities.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: These beautiful facilities form just part of the excellence that makes up the Expressive Arts at Kellett School. The breadth of the curriculum, the extensive extra-curricular activities offered and the strength in teaching expertise in this area give Expressive Arts at Kellett School its strong and enviable reputation.

Tara shared a bit about her experience working in media and gave amazing career advice to our @kellett_sixthform & @kellettklbsenior students.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Kellett School graduates consistently achieve outstanding IGCSE and A-level results, with many gaining admission to prestigious universities worldwide. In 2023, 88% secured places at their first choice or insurance universities, reflecting their academic excellence.

Name: Hong Kong International School
Tagline: An American-style education grounded in the Christian faith and respecting the spiritual lives of all.

Outcomes: Hong Kong International School graduates are accepted into prestigious universities worldwide, including Ivy League schools. Students excel in international competitions, showcasing their talents in academics, arts, and sports, reflecting the school's commitment to holistic development.

Regular community-building activities foster a supportive environment, aligning with Hong Kong's emphasis on holistic education.

Emphasizing inquiry-based learning, HKIS prepares students for international academic challenges and diverse career paths.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from HKIS have a strong track record of acceptance into Ivy League and top-tier universities globally. Students consistently achieve high scores in AP exams, reflecting the school's academic rigor and competitive edge.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: HKIS maintains quality through regular accreditation reviews and detailed progress reports, ensuring transparency and accountability. Parent-teacher conferences facilitate open communication, aligning with Hong Kong's educational standards for continuous improvement.

Name: The ISF Academy
Tagline: Tomorrow’s education inspired by the spirit of innovation and world-shaping experiences of Nobel Laureate Professor Charles Kao as Founding Chairman.
About: The ISF Academy is a leading bilingual IB World School in Hong Kong, offering a unique blend of Eastern and Western educational philosophies. It emphasizes innovation and critical thinking, inspired by the legacy of Nobel Laureate Professor Charles Kao.
Philosophy: The ISF Academy's educational approach integrates inquiry-based learning with a strong bilingual curriculum, fostering global-mindedness and cultural fluency. It nurtures students to become independent thinkers and responsible global citizens, ready for diverse future challenges.
Outcomes: ISF celebrates outstanding International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP) results and an impressive range of tertiary education offers with the 68 graduates from the Class of 2023. Since graduating its first IBDP cohort in 2012, the size of the ISF graduating class has grown significantly.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply through an online application process, which includes submission of academic records and an interview. The admissions timeline typically begins in the fall, with offers made in the spring for the following academic year.
Quote: Nurturing global citizens through bilingual education, fostering curiosity, resilience, and a lifelong passion for learning.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The ISF Academy's faculty includes educators with advanced degrees from prestigious global universities and extensive IB training. Many teachers possess international teaching experience, enhancing their ability to deliver a rich, bilingual curriculum.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The ISF Academy offers comprehensive pastoral care and a dedicated counseling team to support student wellbeing. Regular wellness programs and community-building activities are integral to fostering a supportive school environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The ISF Academy's curriculum integrates the IB Diploma Programme with a strong emphasis on inquiry-based learning across subjects. Students benefit from a bilingual education that prepares them for global academic challenges.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from The ISF Academy achieve high IB scores, with many securing places at top universities worldwide. The Class of 2023 received offers from Ivy League institutions and leading UK universities.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The ISF Academy boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including science labs, art studios, and a performing arts center. The campus also features a sports complex with a swimming pool and multiple courts.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The ISF Academy maintains rigorous academic standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. Continuous accreditation and internal reviews ensure the quality of education remains high.

Name: French International School Hong Kong

The university guidance department aims to ensure students are fully aware of the demands of higher education, and corresponding career prospects, and to enable each student to develop and implement their own personalised plan.

Performance.Ongoing Accountability: There is a wide range of activities to choose from, from sports and arts, through to the cultural and educational. We regularly monitor our extracurricular activities, reviewing them each year to ensure they are of consistently high quality.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The French International School Hong Kong offers a robust pastoral care system with dedicated counsellors and wellness programmes, fostering a supportive community environment for students' mental and emotional health.
Performance.Academic Integration: The school integrates the French curriculum with the International Baccalaureate (IB) programme, offering a bilingual education that includes IGCSEs, preparing students for both local and international academic pathways.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from the French International School Hong Kong achieve high acceptance rates at top universities globally, with many excelling in IB exams, showcasing strong academic performance and diverse career readiness.

Name: Hong Kong Football Club
Tagline: As one of the finest sporting clubs in Asia, Hong Kong Football Club boasts superb facilities across a broad spectrum of competitive and recreational sports. One of the largest and most successful clu
About: Hong Kong Football Club is a prestigious institution offering a wide range of sports and recreational activities. Known for its superb facilities, it serves as a hub for both competitive athletes and recreational enthusiasts in Hong Kong.
Philosophy: The club emphasizes holistic development through sports, fostering teamwork, discipline, and sportsmanship. It aims to nurture talent across all ages, promoting a balanced and healthy lifestyle in the vibrant Hong Kong community.
Outcomes: Members of the Hong Kong Football Club frequently excel in local and international competitions, reflecting the club's commitment to high-level training. The club's athletes often achieve recognition in various sports, contributing to Hong Kong's sporting prestige.
Admissions: Prospective members can apply through the club's website, with applications reviewed on a rolling basis. Requirements include a nomination by current members, ensuring a community-focused and engaged membership base.
Quote: Unite in passion, excel through discipline, and inspire greatness on and off the field.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Main Soccer Sevens tournament has seen under 23 sides visiting from major clubs worldwide, including names such as Atletico Madrid, Aston Villa, Bayer Leverkusen, Brighton and Hove Albion, Celtic, Chelsea, Leicester City, Liverpool, Kashima Antlers, Manchester United, Manchester City, Newcastle United, Glasgow Rangers, Urawa Red Diamonds, West Ham United and Wolverhampton Wanderers. The event also features a Masters tournament that has seen participation from many famous international players of the past.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Of the 300-plus members in the Soccer Section, the vast majority are active playing members, either for one of the six competitive men's teams, the ladies team, one of three social sides, or HKFC Youth and Junior teams. The Club’s Junior Soccer programme is open to the Hong Kong community, members and non-members and more than 1,000 children and young people participate in the programme.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: HKFC Swimming and Triathlon Society offers competition, intensive training, technique improvement and social activities related to both swimming and triathlon. The Club’s 25-metre five-lane outdoor pool is open 11 months of the year and is divided into lanes for different swimming abilities and intensity of training.
Performance.Academic Integration: Hong Kong Football Club collaborates with local schools and international institutions to offer tailored sports programmes complementing the IB and DSE curricula. These programmes focus on integrating physical education with academic excellence, promoting a balanced development.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Athletes from Hong Kong Football Club have secured placements in top universities globally, aided by their outstanding performances in international competitions. The club boasts a high acceptance rate for sports scholarships at prestigious institutions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The club employs a rigorous review cycle, providing quarterly progress reports to members and parents to ensure continuous improvement. Regular feedback sessions and accreditation reviews maintain the club's high standards of training and development.

Name: Hong Kong Jockey Club
Tagline: 致力提供世界最高水平的賽馬、體育及博彩娛樂，同時維持全港最大慈善公益資助機構的地位。
About: The Hong Kong Jockey Club is a premier members club and sports organization, renowned for its world-class horse racing, sports, and betting entertainment. It is also Hong Kong's largest charitable donor, significantly contributing to the community's welfare.
Philosophy: The club emphasizes excellence and integrity in all its operations, fostering a culture of sportsmanship and responsibility. It aims to enhance the quality of life in Hong Kong through its diverse range of activities and charitable initiatives.
Outcomes: The Hong Kong Jockey Club has been instrumental in supporting numerous community projects and initiatives, enhancing public welfare and sports development. Its contributions have led to improved facilities and opportunities in sports and recreation across Hong Kong.
Admissions: Membership to the Hong Kong Jockey Club is exclusive, requiring a nomination by existing members and approval by the club's committee. Prospective members should demonstrate a commitment to the club's values and community engagement.

Name: Haven Education
Tagline: At Haven Education, we go beyond grades. Expert tutoring in IB, IGCSE, A‑Levels & more, grounded in care, confidence & growth. Start a better learning journey.
About: Learning has become a transactional, rote-memorization exercise Educational syllabi undervalue critical soft skills, empathy, and personal development It started in Hong Kong's classrooms. We kept meeting these incredible students, but their spark was being buried under the constant pressure to perform.We realized the most important thing they were missing wasn't on any syllabus: it was a mentor who actually cared.
Philosophy: Haven Education emphasizes personalized mentoring that nurtures critical thinking and emotional intelligence, beyond traditional academic metrics. Our approach fosters a supportive environment where students are encouraged to explore their passions and develop holistically.

Name: Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts
Tagline: The Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts is a leading tertiary institution in performing arts in Asia. The study encompasses Chinese Opera, Dance, Drama, Film and Television, Music, and Theatre and E
About: The Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts (HKAPA), established by The Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts Ordinance in 1984, is a world-leading higher education institution for the performing arts. It provides professionally-oriented undergraduate education and postgraduate studies in Chinese Opera, Dance, Drama, Film and Television, Music, and Theatre and Entertainment Arts.
Philosophy: As one of the world's leading institutions for performing arts education, HKAPA encompasses six diverse schools—Chinese Opera, Dance, Drama, Music, Film and Television, and Theatre and Entertainment Arts—creating a vibrant, interdisciplinary environment that fosters creativity and cultural exchange. Professor Anna CY Chan is the Director of The Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts.
Outcomes: Graduates of the Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts have successfully joined prestigious international performing arts companies and have been recipients of numerous awards at global arts competitions. Many alumni have also pursued further studies at top universities worldwide.
Admissions: Prospective students must undergo a rigorous audition process and submit academic transcripts. Applications typically open in the fall, with auditions and interviews conducted in the spring for programs commencing in September.
Quote: Nurturing creative excellence and cultural innovation, we inspire the next generation of performing artists to transform the world.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Faculty members at HKAPA hold advanced degrees from prestigious institutions and possess extensive international performance experience, ensuring high-quality instruction in their respective disciplines.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: HKAPA offers comprehensive counselling services and wellness workshops, fostering a supportive environment that prioritizes students' mental health and emotional resilience.
Performance.Academic Integration: HKAPA's curriculum incorporates both theoretical and practical components, aligning with international standards and offering pathways equivalent to DSE and IB qualifications for specialized performing arts education.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: HKAPA graduates frequently gain acceptance to top global universities and have achieved notable success in international competitions, reflecting the institution's strong emphasis on excellence and professional readiness.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The HKAPA campus in Wan Chai boasts state-of-the-art performance theatres, rehearsal studios, and dedicated spaces for each discipline, providing students with world-class resources for their artistic development.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: HKAPA employs regular progress assessments and detailed feedback sessions, ensuring continuous improvement and maintaining high educational standards through rigorous internal and external reviews.

Name: MindNLife Psychology Practice

Name: Rosewood Hong Kong
Tagline: Soaring over Victoria Harbour, Rosewood Hong Kong is a new centre of gravity on the Kowloon waterfront offering luxury accommodations & exquisite dining.
About: Its verticality reveals breathtaking views through some of the city’s largest windows—Kowloon’s cityscape, mountains peaks, the skyline and harbour waters​. A grand harbour corner where glittering panoramic waters meet refined luxury, and Manor Club privileges with personal butler service create tailored elegance.
Philosophy: Imbued with warmth and personality, dedicated service at Rosewood Hong Kong focuses on making guests' stays as smooth and enjoyable as possible, whether they are traveling for business or leisure. Each of Rosewood Hong Kong’s eleven dining concepts possesses a distinctive character, showcasing creativity and a contemporary interpretation of accessible gastronomy and refined beverage craft.
Outcomes: Rosewood Hong Kong has been recognized for its exceptional service and luxury, earning accolades in hospitality awards. Its wellness programs are praised for enhancing guest well-being, contributing to a prestigious reputation in the luxury hotel sector.
Admissions: To join Rosewood Hong Kong's wellness and lifestyle programs, guests can book directly through the hotel's website or contact the concierge. Availability may vary, so early inquiries are recommended to secure preferred dates and services.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Rosewood Hong Kong's wellness experts possess international certifications in holistic health and luxury hospitality, with staff trained in renowned institutions like the International Spa Association. Their expertise ensures a world-class wellness experience for guests.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Rosewood Hong Kong offers comprehensive wellness programs, including mindfulness workshops and personalized fitness regimes, fostering mental and physical health. Their dedicated wellness concierge ensures tailored support for each guest's unique needs.
Performance.Academic Integration: While not an academic institution, Rosewood Hong Kong integrates educational elements into its wellness programs, offering workshops on mindfulness and stress management, beneficial for students from local and international schools in Hong Kong.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Rosewood Hong Kong's wellness programs have been acclaimed in luxury hospitality awards, reflecting their excellence in enhancing guest experiences. Their holistic approach supports personal growth and professional development in the luxury sector.

Name: MindfulKids HK

Performance.Student Wellbeing: MindfulKids HK provides comprehensive pastoral care, including personalized counselling and group workshops, to enhance students' emotional resilience. They foster a supportive community, promoting mental health awareness within Hong Kong's educational landscape.

Name: Hong Kong Children's Choir
Tagline: 香港兒童合唱團（簡稱「香兒」）成立於1969年，為香港首隊兒童合唱團及政府註冊非牟利慈善團體，多年來積極推動藝術培訓，為香港音樂及文化界培育不少人才。
About: The Hong Kong Children’s Choir (HKCC), founded in 1969, is the first and largest children’s choir in Hong Kong with around 5,000 members. Registered as a non-profit-making charitable organization, HKCC has grown into a diversified arts organization.
Philosophy: HKCC organizes numerous concerts and performances annually, allowing members to share their love for the arts with the community. In 2019, HKCC presented the “Asia Pacific Choral Summit” which was awarded the 14th HKADC Award for Arts Promotion and the “Hong Kong Choral Conducting Competition” to celebrate its 50th Anniversary.
Outcomes: The Hong Kong Children's Choir has nurtured numerous talents who have gone on to perform internationally and win prestigious awards. Alumni have been accepted into top music programs and universities, contributing significantly to Hong Kong's vibrant cultural scene.
Admissions: As a diversified arts organisation for children, The Hong Kong Children's Choir (HKCC) offers five distinct learning programmes for children with different artistic aspirations and interests, including Choral Programme, Dance Programme, Instrumental Programme, Putonghau Programme and Intelligence-Emotion-Creativity (IEC) Programme.
Quote: Inspiring harmony and creativity in young hearts, nurturing a lifelong passion for music and the arts.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Lin was educated at the Music Department of Chinese University of Hong Kong and studied piano performance with Prof David Gwilt. After graduation, she was awarded a scholarship to pursue a Music Master's Degree at the Birmingham Conservatoire in the UK.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Students who are majoring in music or voice and studying at one of the five institutions with a Music Department in Hong Kong, with outstanding academic results and the school’s recommendation, will be qualified as recipients of the scholarship.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Hong Kong Children's Choir fosters student wellbeing through comprehensive pastoral care and community-building activities, ensuring a supportive environment. Regular wellness workshops and counselling services are provided to address emotional and mental health needs.
Performance.Academic Integration: The Choir's programmes incorporate elements of the local DSE curriculum, enhancing students' artistic skills alongside academic pursuits. This integration ensures a balanced development, complementing studies at local and international schools like ESF.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Hong Kong Children's Choir boasts state-of-the-art rehearsal studios equipped with advanced audio-visual technology. These facilities support diverse artistic programmes, providing an optimal environment for choral and instrumental training.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is monitored through detailed reports and regular parent-teacher meetings, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. The Choir adheres to rigorous standards, with periodic reviews to maintain educational excellence and artistic quality.
